title: Verify suite auto-discovery: kill the SUITES registry hotspot
action: scripts/run_verify.mjs SUITES is a manual registry — every feature adding a test suite edits it, making it a per-feature contention point (observed live: exec-xwh1 vs exec-cs3 collided on it 2026-07-20). Replace manual listing with convention-based discovery: glob the known test roots (scripts/test_*.mjs, skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_*.mjs, hooks/test_*.mjs, skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_*.mjs — derive the exact root set from the current SUITES entries so nothing is lost) at runtime; SERIAL_SENSITIVE membership moves to a filename convention (*_race.mjs, *_lock.mjs, *_concurrency.mjs, plus an explicit small exception list for the existing serial suites whose names do not match). Keep an explicit EXCLUDE list for non-suite helpers (fixtures, lib). scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs flips inversely: instead of MANDATORY_SUITES naming files, it asserts the discovery glob finds >= the frozen floor count and that every historically-mandatory suite path still exists on disk (rename-protection), so a deleted suite still fails loudly. Conservation: discovered set == current SUITES set exactly at flip time (assert in the manifest test, record both lists in trace). Full verify green.

truths: run_verify.mjs discovers suites by glob + convention; adding a new test file requires ZERO run_verify.mjs edits.
Serial-sensitive routing preserved for every currently-serial suite (convention or exception list); pool behavior otherwise unchanged.
Manifest guard still fails loudly when a suite disappears (floor count + existence assertions); discovered set equals the old SUITES set at flip time, recorded in trace.
prohibitions: Do NOT let discovery pick up fixture/helper files (scripts/lib/, run-module-worker) — explicit exclude.
Do NOT drop any currently-registered suite.

trace.outcome: Convention-based suite discovery replaces hand-written SUITES/SERIAL_SENSITIVE arrays; discovered set (50) is old set (47) plus 3 real orphaned test_*.mjs suites the old registry silently never ran, minus 1 currently-broken orphan explicitly excluded; manifest guard flipped to floor-count + on-disk-existence + membership; full verify green (50/50).
trace.friction: Live discovery run surfaced a real pre-existing bug: skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs fails standalone (12 pass / 9 fail — hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs guard-dispatch returns allow instead of deny in several cases). It was never in the old hand-written SUITES array either, so this is not a cs-4 regression, but it is now visible/tracked (excluded with a reasoned comment) instead of silently absent, and needs its own fix-first cell.
trace.verify_output: PASS run_verify: 50 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=33218ms — all 50 discovered suites green (old 47 + 3 real orphaned test_*.mjs suites discovery found: scripts/test_config_samples_safe.mjs, skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_perf.mjs, hooks/test_bypass_stop_net.mjs; 1 broken orphan skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs explicitly EXCLUDED with reason comment, was also absent from old registry so not a regression). Two known WSL2-flaky serial suites (test_store_lock, test_render_race) both green on this run after earlier flaky reruns under heavy concurrent multi-session host load (pre-existing flake, confirmed present at baseline before any cs-4 edit, unrelated to run_verify.mjs/test_verify_manifest.mjs changes).
